mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_visitor (visitor_name, id_card, phone, student_id, room_no, enter_time, leave_time, registrar_id, remark) VALUES (#{visitorName}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{studentId}, #{roomNo}, #{enterTime}, #{leaveTime}, #{registrarId}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(enter_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dateStr, COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_visitor WHERE enter_time >= #{start} AND enter_time <= #{end} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(enter_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY dateStr
SELECT room_no AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM t_visitor WHERE enter_time >= #{start} AND enter_time <= #{end} GROUP BY room_no
